data.title: RH Shares Tank After Q4 Disappoints, Analyst Cuts Price Target By 30%; But There's A Silver Lining
data.description: RH stock dropped after downbeat results and outlook, but analyst maintain Outperform rating on potential for growth in medium-term.

data.title: BeiGene Discontinues Lung Cancer Drug Study After Interim Data Showed Limited Survival Benefit
data.description: BeiGene ends its Phase 3 lung cancer trial for ociperlimab after a futility analysis. No new safety concerns were found, and study results will be shared later.

data.title: 'Self-Run' Car Wash Profits 'Thousands' Per Month For Young Entrepreneur: 'I Basically Just Stop By To Mix The Soap'
data.description: 22-year-old Hannah Ingram purchased a coin-operated car wash in Tennessee in 2021 for $140,000. It brings in approximately $5,500 a month in profit and requires almost zero work.

data.title: 99% Of Americans Know Bitcoin, But Only 91% Know Dogecoin: Why?
data.description: One in five American adults own crypto, with 76% viewing it as having a positive impact on their lives, according to a report conducted by the National Cryptocurrency Association.

data.title: Tesla's EV Crown At Risk As BYD Closes In With Breakthrough Charging Tech
data.description: BYD is poised to surpass Tesla in 2025 with a 15.7% market share, driven by its revolutionary ultra-fast charging tech and strong growth strategy.
